'''âl-t-h-r''' ('''kalatheroko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hobday|hobday]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-t-h-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hobday|hobday]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âl-t-h-r
|-
! Lemma
| kalatheroko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilatheroko|thilatheroko]] || [[word:jilatheroko|jilatheroko]] || [[word:shilatheroko|shilatheroko]] || [[word:kilatheroko|kilatheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulatheroko|thuthulatheroko]] || [[word:jujulatheroko|jujulatheroko]] || [[word:shushulatheroko|shushulatheroko]] || [[word:kukulatheroko|kukulatheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulatheroko|thulatheroko]] || [[word:julatheroko|julatheroko]] || [[word:shulatheroko|shulatheroko]] || [[word:kulatheroko|kulatheroko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulatheroko|thulatheroko]] || [[word:julatheroko|julatheroko]] || [[word:shulatheroko|shulatheroko]] || [[word:kulatheroko|kulatheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelatheroko|thelatheroko]] || [[word:jelatheroko|jelatheroko]] || [[word:shelatheroko|shelatheroko]] || [[word:kelatheroko|kelatheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholatheroko|thotholatheroko]] || [[word:jojolatheroko|jojolatheroko]] || [[word:shosholatheroko|shosholatheroko]] || [[word:kokolatheroko|kokolatheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholatheroko|tholatheroko]] || [[word:jolatheroko|jolatheroko]] || [[word:sholatheroko|sholatheroko]] || [[word:kolatheroko|kolatheroko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholatheroko|tholatheroko]] || [[word:jolatheroko|jolatheroko]] || [[word:sholatheroko|sholatheroko]] || [[word:kolatheroko|kolatheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠlatheroko|thĂŠlatheroko]] || [[word:jĂŠlatheroko|jĂŠlatheroko]] || [[word:shĂŠlatheroko|shĂŠlatheroko]] || [[word:kĂŠlatheroko|kĂŠlatheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalatheroko|thathalatheroko]] || [[word:jajalatheroko|jajalatheroko]] || [[word:shashalatheroko|shashalatheroko]] || [[word:kakalatheroko|kakalatheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalatheroko|thalatheroko]] || [[word:jalatheroko|jalatheroko]] || [[word:shalatheroko|shalatheroko]] || [[word:kalatheroko|kalatheroko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalatheroko|thalatheroko]] || [[word:jalatheroko|jalatheroko]] || [[word:shalatheroko|shalatheroko]] || [[word:kalatheroko|kalatheroko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:shalatherithi|shalatherithi]] || [[word:shalatheriji|shalatheriji]] || [[word:shalatherishi|shalatherishi]] || [[word:shalatheriki|shalatheriki]]

|-
